---
title: "Get a vendor"
description: "Retrieve a single vendor by ID"
---

`GET /vendor/{id}`

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | string | ID of a vendor |

## Example Response

```json
{
  "vendor": {
    "Id": "1234",
    "Name": "John Smith",
    "Email": "john.smith@mailsac.com"
  }
}
```
